lowcode.model/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
Upgrade Lombok version to a release compatible with Java 21 and modern toolchains.
Exclude transitive JUnit 4 dependency from junit-platform-runner to avoid conflicts with JUnit 5.
Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version that supports Java 21 compilation features.
Replace deprecated source/target configuration with the unified release flag for cross-compilation.

lowcode.model/src/test/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 static import with JUnit 5 equivalent to align with the Spring Boot 3.3 migration.
lowcode.model/src/test/java/de/zeb/lowco.why_exists: org.junit.Assert is part of JUnit 4 and may be removed or cause classpath conflicts in a pure JUnit 5/Spring Boot 3 environment; JUnit 5 is the required testing framework.

lowcode.model/src/test/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: Replace legacy List.get(0) with the Java 21 List.getFirst() method for cleaner collection access.
Migrate JUnit 4 assertion import to JUnit 5 equivalent.
lowcode.model/src/test/java/de/zeb/lowco.why_exists: The class uses @Test from org.junit.jupiter.api, indicating a JUnit 5 test; using org.junit.Assert (JUnit 4) causes a compile error or runtime NoClassDefFoundError if JUnit 4 is not on the classpath, and is semantically incorrect for the JUnit 5 engine.
